product_overview: Sinyal is a social media content intelligence workspace that helps creators, agencies, and brands discover viral content, analyze creator profiles, and extract comments across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, X and Facebook from a single dashboard.
core_goals: Allow fast keyword-based discovery of trending social media content across multiple platforms
Provide creator profile analysis to surface audience and engagement signals
Enable extraction and inspection of video comments for qualitative insight
Expose account-level quota and plan information and an upgrade path
Support guest and free-user access with lightweight onboarding and clear quota enforcement

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Marketing homepage with interactive demo, use-case tabs, pricing overview and CTAs to start or view pricing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch use-case tabs between UMKM, Agency, Creator Scout -> Toggle demo panel between Lagi rame, Vetting creator, Baca komentar -> Use Mulai Gratis CTA to navigate to /signup
Navigate to / -> Click Lihat Harga to smooth-scroll to pricing section -> Use pricing plan CTA to navigate to /payment -> If network error occurs, see inline error and retry

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new account with email and password using Supabase Auth and start onboarding.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit signup form (POST /api/auth/signup) -> Be redirected to /start on success
Navigate to /signup -> Fill in invalid email or weak password -> Submit signup form -> See validation error or duplicate-email error message

features.name: User Signin
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to establish a secure session and access the app workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /signin -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit signin form (POST /api/auth/signin) -> Receive session cookie and be redirected to /app on success
Navigate to /signin -> Fill in wrong credentials -> Submit signin form -> See error message about invalid credentials

features.name: User Signout
features.description: End the authenticated session by clearing auth cookies and returning to the public site.
user_flows: From /app while authenticated -> Initiate sign out -> POST to /api/auth/signout executes -> Auth cookies are cleared and user is redirected to /
From /app while authenticated -> Initiate sign out -> signout API returns an error -> See error message and remain on /app

features.name: App Dashboard - Keyword Search (Riset)
features.description: Search for trending content by keyword across selectable platforms and review result cards with engagement metrics and transcript snippets.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Switch to Riset tab -> Type keyword -> Select platform(s) (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, Facebook) -> Set max results slider -> Trigger search which calls GET /api/search -> See result cards with title, metrics, hashtags and transcript snippets -> Expand a result transcript using Baca semua
Navigate to /app -> Switch to Riset tab -> Type keyword -> Trigger search -> API responds with quota exceeded (HTTP 429/402) -> See inline error with upgrade guidance linking to /payment

features.name: App Dashboard - Profile Analysis (Profil)
features.description: Analyze a creator's feed and aggregate profile metrics to surface follower, view and engagement statistics.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Switch to Profil tab -> Enter TikTok username -> Trigger profile analysis via GET /api/profile -> See profile stats (followers, following, avg views, engagement) and feed cards
Navigate to /app -> Switch to Profil tab -> Enter non-existent or malformed username -> Trigger profile analysis -> See error indicating profile not found or extraction failed

features.name: App Dashboard - Comments Extraction (Komentar)
features.description: Extract and surface comments from a specific video URL and show a comment intelligence log.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Switch to Komentar tab -> Paste TikTok video URL -> Optionally set max comments -> Trigger extraction via GET /api/comments -> See extracted comment list and comment intelligence log
Navigate to /app -> Switch to Komentar tab -> Paste invalid or unsupported video URL -> Trigger extraction -> See error message about invalid URL or failed extraction

features.name: Account Page
features.description: Authenticated user area showing current plan, quota usage ring, active features and quick links to manage billing or return to the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /account while authenticated -> See quota ring displaying daily searches used and remaining -> See current plan name, price and active feature list -> Use Kelola Paket link to navigate to /payment
Navigate to /account while unauthenticated -> Be redirected to /signin or see an access denied message

features.name: Payment Page
features.description: Display available plans and provide a path to upgrade via external checkout and webhook-based plan provisioning.
user_flows: Navigate to /payment -> View plan cards (Free, Starter, Pro, Lifetime) -> Select a plan to upgrade -> Be redirected to external payment provider (Mayar) -> After webhook processing, see updated plan and quota reflected in /account
Navigate to /payment -> Select a plan -> External payment is cancelled or fails -> See payment failure message and remain on /payment

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Persistent left navigation in the app allowing quick access to workspace tabs, account and billing screens and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Use sidebar to navigate to /account -> Return to /app -> Use sidebar to navigate to /payment
Navigate to /app -> Use sidebar sign out action -> Signout flow encounters an API error -> See error message and remain on the current app tab

tech_stack: Plus Jakarta Sans / DM Serif Display fonts

routes.description: Landing page with hero, features, use cases, and pricing sections
User registration page with email and password
User login page with email and password
Main application dashboard with keyword search, profile analysis, comments, and transcript features
User account page showing plan, quota ring, features, and platform access

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Marketing landing page with interactive demo panel, feature grid, use-case tabs (UMKM/Agency/Creator Scout), 4-column pricing grid, trust strip, and CTA
user_interactions: Toggle demo panel between Lagi rame, Vetting creator, Baca komentar
Switch use-case tabs between UMKM, Agency, Creator Scout
Click Mulai Gratis CTA to navigate to /signup
Click Lihat Harga to smooth-scroll to pricing section
Click pricing plan CTA buttons to go to /signup or /checkout/{plan}
Click nav links (Fitur, Contoh Pakai, Harga, Masuk)
Open mobile hamburger menu on small screens

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create new account with email and password via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Daftar (Register) button to submit
See error message on invalid input or duplicate email
Redirect to /signin or /app on success

features.name: User Signin
features.description: Login with email and password via Supabase Auth, sets HTTP-only cookies
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Masuk (Login) button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to /app on success

features.name: User Signout
features.description: Logout by clearing auth cookies and calling signout API
user_interactions: Click Keluar (Logout) button in sidebar or navbar

features.name: App Dashboard - Keyword Search
features.description: Search for trending content across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, Facebook by keyword
user_interactions: Type keyword in search input
Select platform checkboxes (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, Facebook)
Set max results slider
Click Cari (Search) button
View result cards with video title, views, likes, comments, engagement metrics
Click Baca semua to expand transcript
Click download buttons for JSON/CSV/PDF export

features.name: App Dashboard - Profile Analysis
features.description: Analyze a creator TikTok profile with feed metrics
user_interactions: Switch to Profile tab
Enter TikTok username
Click Analisis button
View profile stats (followers, following, avg views, engagement)

features.name: App Dashboard - Comments Extraction
features.description: Extract and display comments from a specific video URL
user_interactions: Switch to Komentar tab
Paste video URL
Click Tarik Komentar button
View extracted comments list

features.name: Account Page
features.description: View user account details, plan info, quota usage ring, active features, and platform access
user_interactions: View quota ring showing daily searches used/remaining
View current plan name and price
View feature list for current plan
View active platform badges
Click Kelola Paket to go to /payment
Click quick links to /app, /payment, or /

features.name: Payment Page
features.description: View available plans and upgrade subscription
user_interactions: View plan cards (Free, Starter, Pro, Lifetime)
Click upgrade button on a plan

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Left sidebar in the app with nav links and upgrade button
user_interactions: Click Akun link to go to /account
Click Billing link to go to /payment
Click Upgrade to Pro button to go to /payment
Click Keluar to sign out

known_limitations.issue: Server is a single monolithic Python file with all HTML templates embedded
known_limitations.impact: Large file size, all frontend code is server-rendered strings

known_limitations.issue: Free tier allows unauthenticated access to /app
known_limitations.impact: Users can use basic search without signing in

known_limitations.issue: Supabase email confirmation may be required depending on project settings
known_limitations.impact: Newly signed-up users may need to confirm email before signin works
